// note: Compiles the harness + Minimal 3v3 Basketball game (web/src/*.ts) to web/dist/*.js via tsgo. `@axiom/game` resolves to the SDK's built declarations for typecheck; the emitted JS keeps the bare specifier, resolved in the browser by the import map in index.html (dev) or inlined by the packager (gallery). The shared axiom-game-runtime wasm + the SDK boot edge resolve by absolute path. Tests (*.test.ts) are excluded — they run under `node --test` with native TS type-stripping (no wasm, no DOM), so they need no compile here.
